name: tencentdb-agent-memory
description: Four-layer long-term memory (L0→L1→L2→L3 Persona) with hybrid FTS5+vector recall + L2 scene-navigation. CLI: tmem (status, search, recall, scene, scenes, changelog, persona, sync, config, daemon, atoms, sessions, write-l1, write-scene, write-persona, mark-done, init). Run /memory-init first.
